message:
refactor(sql): extract HAVING, set ops, window eval modules

- Extract HAVING evaluation to having_eval.zig (223 lines)
- Extract set operations to set_ops.zig (192 lines)
- Extract window evaluation to window_eval.zig (374 lines)
- executor.zig reduced from 3,525 to 2,869 lines (19% reduction)

Uses composition pattern with explicit parameters instead of self.*
